title: ReEnchant
description: Re-enchant your items directly in the enchanting table without using a grindstone.
body:
## ReEnchant

Place an already-enchanted item in the enchanting table and pick a new enchantment - the old one gets replaced instantly. No grindstone needed.

### Features

- Re-enchant any enchantable item directly in the table
- Costs XP and lapis like a normal enchantment
- Works with modded enchantments
- Compatible with Enchant & Repair

### How it works

1. Place your enchanted item + lapis in the enchanting table
2. Enchantment options appear like normal
3. Click one - your old enchantments are replaced with new ones

Used in the [Legends Reborn: Medieval](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/legends-reborn-medieval) modpack.
